calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2025 Continued To Jan-07-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to Open court, Counsel for Defendant Erik Morrison appears in an abundance of caution.
The Court releases counsel at 9:03.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EUROMOTORS, INC., ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS MERCEDES BENZ SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO Motion For Change Of Venue.

Defendant Euromotors, Inc.'s unopposed motion to change venue is GRANTED.

Defendant resides in San Mateo County, and it appears San Mateo County is a proper venue for this matter and may be the only proper venue absent any information on where the personal injury or property loss occurred. (See Code of Civil Procedure sections 395 & 395.5.)

This action is ordered transferred to San Mateo County Superior Court. Defendant Euromotors, Inc., who is responsible for the lion's share of the filings on the register of actions, to pay the costs of transfer.

A proposed order is submitted prior to the hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
